TRAP.title: Trap
TRAP.description: Attack damage taken is increased by 100%.
SHINE.title: Shine
SHINE.description: Effective on cards with Shine. Increase by a value equal to Shine.
REVENGE.title: Revenge
REVENGE.description: Effective on cards with Shine. Multiply the card value according to Revenge; when playing a shining card, you will lose life equal to Revenge.
PLAN_COST.title: Plan
PLAN_COST.description: Playing this card requires {Amount} layers of planning.
RUMOR.title: Gossip
RUMOR.description: Each layer increases attack damage received by 10%.
ESCAPE.title: Get Away
ESCAPE.description: Attack damage taken is reduced by 50%.
